top3.sql:
SELECT u.Id, u.DisplayName
FROM users u
JOIN postHistory ph ON u.Id = ph.UserId
GROUP BY u.Id, u.DisplayName
HAVING COUNT(ph.PostId) = 1 AND u.Views >= 1000;

SELECT u.Id, u.DisplayName
FROM users u
JOIN postHistory ph ON u.Id = ph.UserId
GROUP BY u.Id, u.DisplayName
HAVING COUNT(ph.PostId) = 1 AND u.Views >= 1000;

SELECT u.Id, u.DisplayName
FROM users u
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT UserId, PostId
    FROM postHistory
    GROUP BY UserId, PostId
    HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
) ph ON u.Id = ph.UserId
WHERE u.Views >= 1000
GROUP BY u.Id, u.DisplayName
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ph.PostId) >= 1;

SELECT u.Id, u.DisplayName
FROM users u
JOIN postHistory ph ON u.Id = ph.UserId
JOIN posts p ON ph.PostId = p.Id
WHERE p.ViewCount >= 1000
GROUP BY u.Id, u.DisplayName
HAVING COUNT(ph.PostId) = 1;

SELECT u.Id, u.DisplayName
FROM users u
JOIN postHistory ph ON u.Id = ph.UserId
GROUP BY u.Id, u.DisplayName
HAVING COUNT(ph.PostId) = 1 AND u.Views >= 1000;

SELECT u.Id, u.DisplayName
FROM users u
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT UserId, PostId
    FROM postHistory
    GROUP BY UserId, PostId
    HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
) ph ON u.Id = ph.UserId
INNER JOIN posts p ON ph.PostId = p.Id
WHERE u.Views >= 1000 AND p.ViewCount >= 1000
GROUP BY u.Id, u.DisplayName
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ph.PostId) >= 1;

SELECT u.Id, u.DisplayName
FROM users u
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT UserId, PostId
    FROM postHistory
    GROUP BY UserId, PostId
    HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
) ph ON u.Id = ph.UserId
WHERE u.Views >= 1000
GROUP BY u.Id, u.DisplayName
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ph.PostId) >= 1;

final.sql:
SELECT u.Id, u.DisplayName
FROM users u
JOIN postHistory ph ON u.Id = ph.UserId
GROUP BY u.Id, u.DisplayName
HAVING COUNT(ph.PostId) = 1 AND u.Views >= 1000;
